title: Cyanea pycnocarpa
taxonomy: Cyanea pycnocarpa is a species of flowering plant in the family Goodeniaceae. It is endemic to the island of Kauai in the state of Hawaii. The plant is a member of the genus Cyanea, which is a group of flowering plants native to Hawaii. Cyanea pycnocarpa is also known as the Kauai cyanea or Hawaiian cyanea. The classification of Cyanea pycnocarpa is further broken down into its scientific name, which is a combination of its genus and species.
uses: Cyanea pycnocarpa, a plant species native to Hawaii, has been used in traditional medicine by the local population for its potential health benefits.
